case_title: STERN, NATHAN vs. DUBURG, JEREMY C. et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STERN, NATHAN AS TO DEFENDANT DUBURG, JEREMY C. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STERN, NATHAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DUBURG, JEREMY C. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 645 RANDOLPH ST #7, LEASE FORFEITED
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF STERN, NATHAN AS TO DEFENDANT DUBURG, JEREMY C.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT DUBURG, JEREMY C.

AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $110.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF STERN, NATHAN AS TO DEFENDANT DUBURG, JEREMY C.
